title: Verify and align CONFIG options in t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf across worker17 and main
description: Compare CONFIG_* settings in lichen/apps/gateway/boards/t_deck_esp32s3_procpu.conf between project-LICHEN-worker17 and main worker7. Apply any missing tunings (stacks, heap, WiFi buffers, NVS, RPL, etc.) to ensure consistency. Check puck variant too.
